findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "search_products" is 5931 chars, far longer than this server's median (877). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

confidence.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
confidence.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_products, get_product, search_wanted, submit_feedback, create_product, update_product, get_upload_url, upload_product_image · Private data: get_product, get_store, search_wanted, create_buy_request, submit_feedback, create_product, update_product, delete_product_image, get_upload_url, upload_product_image · Public sink: search_products, get_product, search_wanted, create_buy_request, submit_feedback, create_product, get_upload_url, upload_product_image · Destructive: search_products, delete_product, delete_product_image, add_inventory_item, delete_inventory_item.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_products, get_product, search_wanted, submit_feedback, create_product, update_product, get_upload_url, upload_product_image · Private data: get_product, get_store, search_wanted, create_buy_request, submit_feedback, create_product, update_product, delete_product_image, get_upload_url, upload_product_image · Public sink: search_products, get_product, search_wanted, create_buy_request, submit_feedback, create_product, get_upload_url, upload_product_image · Destructive: search_products, delete_product, delete_product_image, add_inventory_item, delete_inventory_item

confidence.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
